scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,DESKTOP,EXT,AGENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/sync-server" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/desktop" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/extension" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/agent"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/sync-server && npm run build --workspace=packages/desktop && npm run build --workspace=packages/extension && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent
